title: centaurea calocephala
intro: Centaurea calocephala, also known as the Red-Headed Knapweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Centaurea calocephala include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infuse in oil for its herbal preparations, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
